title: ARI Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Project Associate Posts
description: Agharkar Research Institute (ARI) has announced the latest notification for the recruitment of various Senior Project Associate Jobs. Candidates who have completed their post-graduation, M.Sc, M.V.Sc, Ph.D, M.E/ M.Tech can grab this chance and apply for the ARI Notification 2026 . Here we provide more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
